assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks section with commands to verify current versions, check cluster health with kubectl get nodes and pods, and verify system components

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 2 includes the exact command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)"' to check available versions in the Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Step 3 explicitly includes 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' command to check for deprecated API usage before upgrading

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33' with the required --master flag

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 3 of Phase 1 includes verification commands to check the control plane version and system pod health after upgrade completion

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Phase 2 provides exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools directly to 1.33, effectively using skip-level upgrade approach

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Response includes 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide' command and gcloud operations list command to monitor node pool upgrade progress in real-time

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Control plane is upgraded sequentially from 1.32 to 1.33, and node pools are upgraded directly to 1.33 in a skip-level fashion

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 3 includes comprehensive validation steps checking node versions, pod health across all namespaces, and kube-system pod status

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes detailed troubleshooting section and explicitly addresses rollback with 'Issue 4: If you need to cancel/rollback' explaining that control plane cannot be rolled back and how to handle node pool issues
